title: Analytics - Support App Opened
scenario: Support App Opened event is logged when navigating to Support > App screen, tracking occurrences with default analytics elements and delayed event count updates.
expected: The Support App Opened event is logged, tracking occurrences and including default analytics elements: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment. Event counts are updated after a few hours.
